roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: STATUS OF DEJ & POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/MO PC 1385:DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT /X: DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA IS WITHDRAWN ON COUNT 3/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, PC 245(A)(4), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR SIX MONTHS IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO OBTAIN NO NEW ARRESTS RESULTING IN CHARGES SUPPORTED BY PROBABLE CAUSE AND TO STAY AWAY FROM GIOVANNI VELLA AND  240 JONES ST SFCA (6TH FLOOR), IF DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THESE TERMS FOR SIX MONTHS, THE PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND PROPOSED SENTENCE IS TO BE DISMISSED/WS/TWS/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/EMTERM/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER ANDSTIPULATES TO A NEW  LAST DAY FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING,/LDPX: STIPULATED 09-21-21 (60)/CONT/DOPU: NO DISPOSITION,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 09-07-21 (60)/987,2/OR/SA1: GIOVANNI VELLA/SAORD4: 20 FEET/SA2: 240 JONES ST SF CA/X: STAY OFF 6TH FLOOR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:DEFENDANT ALLOWEDTO VISIT SACRAMENTO/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS OF DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT/DAWT/CONTD: POSSIBLE DISMISSAL/DOPC/
/CAL:STATUS OF DEJ/X:DEFENDANT HAS NOT GAINED ANY NEW ARREST/CONT/DAW/
/CAL: ADDRESS ELECTRONIC MONITORING STATUS/DAWT/X: THE PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 08-12-21 IS CONFIRMED,/DAWF/LDPX: 09-07-21(60)/
